body.title: Mock infra.pe_failure_log in escalate tests to prevent DB contamination
body.result: added autouse fixture to TestEscalateGateIntegration that stubs psycopg2.connect; DB counts no longer change during test runs; 417c6fa7
body.description:
test_pe_chain_inertia_gate.py calls _pe_escalate() without mocking the DB connection, causing real writes to infra.pe_failure_log. This inflates failure counts and can trigger the auto-ticket-filing logic (count >= 3) during test runs. Confirmed: running the test suite increments all pe_failure_log counts.

**Affected files:** tests/test_pe_chain_inertia_gate.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Add psycopg2 connection mock or patch _escalate_step's DB write path in test_pe_chain_inertia_gate.py. Do NOT mock the entire pe_chain — only the DB write in the escalate path. Out of scope: test_pe_chain_priors.py (already correctly mocks DB).
**Test plan:** After fix, run tests twice and verify infra.pe_failure_log counts do not change between runs.
